title: AASX Package Manifest Reference
description: Reference-level schema for an AASX package manifest entry. An AASX file is a ZIP archive (OPC/ECMA-376 format); this schema describes how the package is referenced and labelled, not the full ZIP structure. Full AASX packaging is specified in IDTA AAS Part 5.

packageUri.description: URI from which the AASX package can be retrieved

packageId.description: Optional stable identifier for this package

shellIds.description: AAS IDs contained in this package

submodelIds.description: Submodel IDs contained in this package
